brief.title: Add a --version line to the norn-fan-worker README
brief.objective: Document the worker's --address/--identity/--task-queue flags in examples/norn-fan-worker/README.md with one short usage section.
brief.context: The norn-fan-worker example has a README that does not document its command-line flags. This is a deliberately small documentation brief used to prove the AWL-authored dev_brief pipeline end to end.
acceptance: README.md documents the --address, --identity, and --task-queue flags in a usage section
no file outside examples/norn-fan-worker/README.md is touched
brief.notes: Keep the section short. Do not restructure the rest of the README.

lenses.name: brief_compliance
lenses.charter: Judge ONLY whether the diff satisfies the brief's acceptance criteria and stays inside scope_in. Blocking finding for any out-of-scope file touched or any acceptance criterion unmet.

lenses.name: clarity
lenses.charter: Judge whether the added documentation is accurate against the worker's actual flags (read examples/norn-fan-worker/src/main.rs) and readable. Blocking finding only for factually wrong flag documentation.
